task_completion.description: Open the patient record or a new clinical evaluation for John Zenon
task_completion.visual_evidence: GNU Health interface showing the patient record or an active clinical evaluation screen for 'John Zenon'.

task_completion.description: Record the severely elevated blood pressure
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vital signs or clinical evaluation section showing a Systolic blood pressure of 165 and a Diastolic blood pressure of 95.

task_completion.description: Record the diagnosis for essential hypertension
task_completion.visual_evidence: Diagnoses or conditions list showing 'Essential hypertension' or the ICD-10 code 'I10'.

task_completion.description: Record the diagnosis for sleep apnea
task_completion.visual_evidence: Diagnoses or conditions list showing 'Sleep apnea' or the ICD-10 code 'G47' (or G47.x).
Prescriptions or medication section showing an active prescription for 'Amlodipine', 'Lisinopril', or 'Losartan'.

task_completion.description: Schedule a reassessment appointment 14 to 30 days in the future
task_completion.visual_evidence: Appointments section showing a scheduled appointment for John Zenon with a date that is 14 to 30 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GNU Health GUI client
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual GNU Health application interface being used, rather than a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing direct SQL database queries (e.g., psql) or Python scripts used to insert the medical records directly into the database.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely entered the data into the appropriate fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Forms, dropdowns, and text fields in GNU Health contain the expected values, rather than the agent just copy-pasting the task description into a single notes field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is John Zenon. Required diagnoses are Essential Hypertension (ICD-10 I10) and Sleep Apnea (ICD-10 G47). Clinical evaluation must show a systolic blood pressure of 165 and diastolic of 95. Acceptable prescribed medications are Amlodipine, Lisinopril, or Losartan. A follow-up appointment must be scheduled between 14 and 30 days from the task start date.
